subjects.description: large cruise ship sailing through the cold Arctic sea
subjects.appearance_details: white multi-deck passenger vessel, rows of windows, dark hull accents, radar mast, lifeboats, icy spray on the bow, and cold reflections on wet metal
subjects.relationship: main moving vessel that collides head-on with the iceberg
subjects.location: center-left of the long shot on the Arctic sea
subjects.relative_size: huge ship, still smaller than the towering iceberg ahead
subjects.orientation: bow pointed directly toward the iceberg across choppy water
subjects.pose: advancing at steady speed with bow cutting through cold waves
subjects.action: sails forward, impacts the iceberg head-on, and throws up a dramatic burst of seawater
subjects.state_changes: bow approaches rapidly; impact spray erupts; ship momentum appears checked by the collision
subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: painted steel, wet glass, icy spray, dark hull surfaces, and cold reflective highlights
subjects.facial_features: bow windows, deck lines, railings, and navigation lights

subjects.description: huge iceberg glowing in cold blue light
subjects.appearance_details: towering blue-white ice mass, jagged ridges, translucent faces, wet surfaces, fractured edges, and dark submerged base
subjects.relationship: immovable obstacle struck by the cruise ship
subjects.location: center-right foreground to midground in the Arctic sea
subjects.relative_size: enormous, taller and broader than the approaching ship
subjects.orientation: front face angled toward the ship, base rooted in cold water
subjects.action: reflects blue light, sheds small ice chips at impact, and channels splashing seawater around its base
subjects.state_changes: blue reflections brighten; spray explodes at the collision point; small ice fragments break off
subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: layered ice, translucent blue planes, rough ridges, frost, cracks, and wet reflective surfaces
subjects.facial_features: jagged ridgelines, crevices, and shadowed ice cavities

subjects.description: cold Arctic sea surrounding the collision
subjects.appearance_details: dark steel-blue water, whitecaps, floating ice pieces, explosive spray, mist, and distant low polar horizon
subjects.relationship: environment that amplifies the impact and intense atmosphere
subjects.location: entire foreground and background around ship and iceberg
subjects.relative_size: vast ocean surface filling the frame
subjects.orientation: horizontal water plane broken by waves and collision spray
subjects.pose: rough cold sea with active wave motion
subjects.action: churns, splashes high at impact, and sends ripples outward through floating ice
subjects.state_changes: waves build at the bow; spray rises sharply; water settles into chaotic foam
subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: cold water, foam, ice fragments, mist, and reflective blue light

background_setting: A cold Arctic seascape in a long shot, with a large cruise ship approaching a massive blue iceberg, dark water, floating ice, misty horizon, and harsh polar atmosphere.

lighting.conditions: Cold blue polar lighting with icy reflections from the iceberg, muted sky glow, bright white spray highlights, and cinematic contrast on the ship hull.
lighting.direction: scene-appropriate key light from the most visible practical or natural source
lighting.shadows: soft scene-consistent shadows that ground subjects and objects
lighting.illumination_effect: Cold blue polar lighting with icy reflections from the iceberg, muted sky glow, bright white spray highlights, and cinematic contrast on the ship hull.

aesthetics.composition: Intense disaster-film tension, Arctic scale, cold blue palette, dramatic collision spray, long-shot spectacle, and crisp icy textures.
aesthetics.color_scheme: colors follow the source prompt and scene materials
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Intense disaster-film tension, Arctic scale, cold blue palette, dramatic collision spray, long-shot spectacle, and crisp icy textures.

cinematography.camera_motion: Long shot with a slow telephoto push, stable horizon, dramatic framing of ship and iceberg, and high-speed water splash detail at impact.
cinematography.focus: main subject and key action remain sharp

artistic_style: Large-scale Arctic realism with cold color grading, intense impact energy, and non-graphic disaster spectacle.
context: A cruise ship in the Arctic sea sails directly into a huge iceberg, creating a dramatic head-on collision with seawater splashing under cold blue light.

actions.description: A long shot shows the cruise ship cutting through cold Arctic water toward a towering blue iceberg.
The bow collides head-on with the iceberg, throwing seawater and ice chips into the air.
Spray falls back into the churning sea as the iceberg reflects cold blue light and the ship slows at the impact point.

segments.description: Establish the cruise ship and huge iceberg in a cold Arctic long shot with tense forward motion.
segments.key_changes: The gap between ship and iceberg closes and water builds around the bow.
segments.camera: Long telephoto shot with slow push and stable horizon.

segments.description: The ship impacts the iceberg head-on, creating a high burst of seawater, foam, and small ice fragments.
segments.key_changes: Collision occurs, spray erupts, and blue ice reflections intensify.
segments.camera: Maintained long shot with slight impact shake and crisp splash detail.

segments.description: After impact, spray collapses into rough water and the ship remains pressed near the iceberg.
segments.key_changes: Water churns into foam, ice chips drift, and the ship visibly slows.
segments.camera: Slow push holds the aftermath in a cinematic wide composition.

temporal_caption: A cruise ship sails through the cold Arctic sea and collides head-on with a huge blue-lit iceberg, sending seawater into the air.
audio_description: Cold wind, heavy ship engine rumble, waves hitting the hull, a deep impact boom, ice cracking, and seawater crashing back down.
